steps.title: Set up the total length function
steps.content: We start with a chain of length 33 cm. We add x line segments, each with length $(8 - r)$ cm. The total length is: $$f(x) = 33 + x(8 - r)$$

steps.title: Expand by distributing and match to the choices
steps.content: Distribute x to each term in the parentheses: $$f(x) = 33 + 8x - rx$$ Rearranging the terms: $$f(x) = 8x - rx + 33$$ That matches choice B — B is correct.
